landing_title: Track the cast albums you love and build a profile around your taste.
landing_lede: Start with one flow: create an account, search the catalog, save albums or tracks you care about, and shape the profile that will support future ratings and recommendations.
login_title: Sign in and get back to your saved musical shortlist.
login_lede: You'll return to your workspace, search flow, and profile setup.
login_email_help: Use the email address tied to your account.
register_title: Create your account and start building your musical library.
register_lede: After sign-up, your first step will be finding albums or tracks to save into your catalog.
display_name_help: Shown inside the app so your account feels recognizable.
register_email_help: Use a working email so you can sign back in later.
profile_setup_banner: Finish your profile so friends and future ratings have a clearer identity to follow.
intro_copy_incomplete: Finish your profile first so the app can show a complete identity, then jump into search.
intro_copy_ready: Your account is ready. Search the catalog, save what matters, and keep moving toward ratings.
recommendations_empty: Rate or favorite songs to personalize this list. Until then, popular tracks will appear here when listeners add them.
empty_recent_ratings: Rate an imported track and it will land here.
action_search_desc: Look up songs and albums in the shared catalog.
action_save_desc: Move selected results into your catalog when you want to keep them.
action_profile_status_desc: Complete your name, handle, avatar, and bio so your account feels finished.
action_taste_desc_empty: Tell us what you listen to.
search_page_title: Find the songs and albums you want to rate next.
search_initial_copy: Search by title, artist, album, or show, then save what belongs in your catalog.
search_short_query: Use at least 2 characters to search the catalog.
search_placeholder: Search by song, album, artist, or show title...
search_examples: Try searches like Hadestown, Sondheim, or Original Broadway Cast.
no_matches_for: No matches for "{{query}}". Try a shorter title, another artist, or switch filters.
end_results: You have reached the end of the current results.
no_results_loaded: No results loaded yet. Search for a title, artist, or album to begin.
review_placeholder_track: What stood out? Mention vocals, arrangement, lyrics, production, or why it belongs in your rotation.
review_placeholder_album: How does the album work as a whole? Mention pacing, standouts, and production.
save_track_first: Save this track to your catalog before adding a favorite or review.
save_album_first: Save this album to your catalog before you can rate it or add it to your profile.
choose_score: Choose a score before saving your review.
import_success: "{{title}}" is now saved in your catalog.
search_listeners_placeholder: Search by name, username, or email
search_listeners_help: Search for listeners by name, username, or email.
min_chars_search: Use at least 2 characters to search.
no_listeners_found: No listeners found for this search.
add_bio_prompt: Add a short bio so people understand your taste.
settings_title: Edit the details people see on your profile.
profile_display_name_help: Shown in the app and on profile surfaces.
username_help: Use the handle people will recognize.
avatar_url_help: Paste a direct link to an image file.
bio_help: Share what you like to rate, collect, or revisit.
empty_saved_albums: Add imported albums from search and they will appear here.
empty_reviews: Your latest reviews will appear here after you rate tracks or albums from search.
empty_favorites: Favorite imported tracks from search to pin them here.
listener_no_bio: This listener has not added a bio yet.
no_notifications: No notifications yet. Follow people or get comments on your reviews to see activity here.
